requests.prompt: Use reference image 1 as the real product identity lock: Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat. Preserve exact shape, oatmeal-beige color, silk‑cotton faille texture, labels, and any visible marks. Render a full-frame studio start scene that fills the canvas edge to edge (no inner frame, borders, insets, central vertical rectangle, or margins). The coat hangs neatly on a natural wood hanger, centered on a slim black metal clothing rack, at plausible scale and orientation. The rack stands on a warm cream seamless cyclorama continuous with the floor and backdrop, clean and uncluttered. Lighting: soft directional key from camera-left with gentle fill; subtle highlight revealing the faille sheen; minimal shadows. No person or hand visible in the first frame. Keep only the coat, hanger, and rack; no extra props or text/logos. Not a product-only packshot; show the full studio scene.
requests.negative_prompt: No captions, subtitles, watermark, UI, fake logo, random letters, extra fingers, warped hands, blurry product, wrong product, product-only packshot, empty background, inner frame, border, poster, inset image, image inside an image, black margins, dark outer margins, central vertical rectangle, photo within a photo, matted print.
